data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Implementation of advanced encryption standards to secure user data and communications between the client and server.

data.title: Access Control Framework
data.description: Strict access control policies to ensure that only authorized users can access sensitive information within Spotify’s ecosystem.
data.technical_spec: OAuth2.0 for user authorization and authentication.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Deployment of real-time threat detection systems that monitor suspicious activities and mitigate potential cyber threats.
data.technical_spec: Intrusion detection systems (IDS) and security information and event management (SIEM) tools.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Robust defenses against distributed denial-of-service attacks to ensure uninterrupted service availability.
data.technical_spec: Arbor Networks and AWS Shield for DDoS protection.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security audits and penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities and bolster the defenses of the platform.
data.technical_spec: Third-party security assessments and in-house ethical hacking initiatives.
